info.title: switch info NX
info.author: dodosi
info.details: SwitchInfoNX is a feature-rich homebrew application that turns your Nintendo Switch into a diagnostics workstation. It provides a real-time overview of CPU/GPU/memory clocks, FPS, RAM & thermal status, Wi-Fi analytics, controller diagnostics with gyroscope/accelerometer, MTP & HTTP file transfer, and a full SD card file browser. It also includes system information (firmware, serial, battery, display), configurable alerts, built-in pixel/haptic test tools, a custom theme editor with 15 presets, and exportable perf/system reports  all wrapped in a clean, tabbed SDL2 interface with touch support and full i18n in 11 languages.\n
